title: Ice's Draconia Region [Cobblemon]
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds fakemon from the Draconia region.
body:
# Ice's Draconia Region [Cobblemon]
This addon for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) adds fakemon from the Draconia region created by my friends and I.
## Installation
**This addon requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) to work.** To enable this addon in your Cobblemon world you must place the .zip file in both the resource pack folder of the modpack and the datapack folder of the world.

### The Pokedex for all Pokemon is located here:
[Draconia Pokedex](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1OAPC813QaqGn1jD52h-oOvBtKYiFTkc3SNT_PfKaVxo/edit?usp=sharing)
## Pokemon currently implemented:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Sparkstrum - (Electric/Dark)
- Buzzlash - (Electric/Dark)
- Shockette - (Electric/Dark)
- Zapnoir - (Electric/Dark)
- Draimond - (Dragon/Fairy)
- Wyverlot - (Dragon/Fairy)
- Altaria mimikyu - (ghost/Fairy)
- Espeon mimikyu - (ghost/Fairy)
- Flareon mimikyu - (ghost/Fairy)

</details>



### Credits:
- Modelers - Catsya, KillerCube, Sause, Angelsaurus & Icewizard776 (Myself)
- Animators - Ayce, Angelsaurus & Icewizard776 (Myself)
